title: Sworn Translator EN→ES (Full-Time)
desc: Full-time sworn translator for one of Spain's largest law firms. Handling corporate contracts, litigation documents, and notarial deeds. Official sworn translator appointment required.

title: Legal Translation Specialist (Freelance)
desc: Freelance legal translator for EN→ES and ES→EN work. Specialising in mergers & acquisitions, financial disclosures, and regulatory filings. CAT tools experience essential.

title: Court Interpreter — Spanish Criminal Courts
desc: Sworn interpreter for criminal proceedings in Catalonia. Requires certification from the Spanish Ministry of Justice. Catalan language skills highly valued.

title: Patent Translator DE→ES (In-House)
desc: In-house patent translator for one of Europe's top IP law firms. Focus on mechanical engineering and pharmaceutical patents. German mother tongue preferred.

title: Financial Translation Reviewer
desc: Review and certify financial translations for audit reports, annual accounts, and regulatory submissions. Minimum 5 years experience required.

title: Sworn Translator EN↔ES (Corporate)
desc: In-house sworn translator for corporate, M&A, and banking practice groups. Sworn appointment by Spanish Ministry of Foreign Affairs required.

title: Legal Document Translator FR→ES
desc: French-to-Spanish legal translator for cross-border litigation and contract work. Sworn translator status an advantage but not required.

title: Immigration Document Translator
desc: Translating visa applications, residence permits, and supporting documents from multiple languages into English or Spanish. Fast turnaround required.

title: Senior Legal Translation Project Manager
desc: Lead a team of 15+ sworn and legal translators. Manage workflows, quality assurance, and client relationships for a top Madrid-based LSP.

title: Audiovisual Translation for Legal Training
desc: Subtitling and translating legal training materials for EU institutions. Languages: EN→ES, FR→ES. AI-powered tools provided.

title: Court Interpreter (Arabic↔Spanish)
desc: Sworn court interpreter for Arabic and Spanish in the Valencian Community. Official interpreter certification mandatory. Civil and criminal cases.

title: Legal Proofreader EN→ES
desc: Proofread legal documents translated from English to Spanish. Must have legal background or sworn translator qualification. Tech contracts a plus.

title: Sworn Translator ES→EN (UK-based)
desc: Sworn translator based in London for Spanish-to-English document certification. Hybrid working, 3 days in office. UK residency required.

title: Technical Patent Translator IT→ES
desc: Italian-to-Spanish patent translator focusing on biotechnology and pharmaceuticals. Specialised terminology databases provided.

title: Litigation Translation Freelancer
desc: Freelance sworn translator for litigation support. Translation of court rulings, expert reports, and procedural documents. CAT tools required.

title: Associate Legal Translator — EU Institutions
desc: Full-time legal translator for the European Commission's Directorate-General for Translation. Permanent staff position. EU-wide competition.

title: Notarial Deed Specialist ES↔EN
desc: Specialist in the translation of notarial deeds, powers of attorney, and incorporation documents. Notarial experience essential.

title: AI-Assisted Legal Translation Contractor
desc: Post-edit AI-generated legal translations with human certification. Premium rates for sworn translators. Portuguese a plus.
